title: The length of Mucawiyah's reign
description: I was told by Abmad b. Thabit al-Razi-someone-Ishaq b. 'lsa-Abu Ma'shar: Mu'awiyah was acknowledged (as caliph) at Adhruh. Al-Hasan b. 'All acknowledged him in Jumadah I 41 (September 2-October r, 661) and Mu'awiyah died in Rajab 6o (April 7-May 6, 68o). His Caliphate lasted nineteen years and three months.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 18
